---
title: "Barbara Kruger"
#subtitle: ""
#author: Kelli Anderson
format: html
image: https://aarhusinside.dk/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/Besoegende-ser-paa-stort-roedt-tekstvaerk-af-Barbara-Kruger-paa-ARoS.webp
image-alt: Barbara Kruger art
---


![](https://i0.wp.com/obeygiant.com/images/2026/01/It-Cant-Happen-18X24.jpg)


<https://obeygiant.com>

<https://www.instagram.com/obeygiant>
